title: Region Selection Viewer
description: A WorldEdit and Axiom selection viewer for precise building and visualizing in Mini-maps.
body:
**Do you work on massive builds or projects and need an easier way to visualize large selection regions?!** (Creepa) Oh man, do I have the solution for you! 

With Region Selection Viewer being used along-side Xaero's Minimap AND/OR Xaero's World Map beside WorldEditCUI AND Axiom. Which ever you choose should work, and together with no problems at all.

This mod was made for a special usecase for myself for my own build project, so I thought to release it for everyone else to use. I would frequently switch between polygon selection regions for WorldEdit and Axiom to verify my build fits inside of certain areas as it provides an overlapping feature to see if anything sticks outside of any WorldEdit region!

This mod has been thoroughly tested and shouldn't have any bugs, or produce any lag!

Feel free to let me know of any requests or recommendations! :)
Please report any bugs if any become present and I'll do my best to fix it as soon as I can!
I will make updates currently as I see fit unless special requests are needed.

![A WorldEdit selection visible in the worldmap with Axiom selection inside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43219ae6412502eb2af0f2498091d2d905fec32a.png)
![WorldEdit selection with Axiom selection half-way overlapping CUI region.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/783a036e87da266be18579fbe5c946a1ed81a922_0.webp)
![WorldEdit selection with Axiom selection half-way overlapping CUI region visible in the World Map.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1669c865cd56d3112716927e5e4ac6f9a0d923da.png)
![An Axiom selection visible in the World Map.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0a406fc2dc2a471bd424a79942ed365419b6c4b.png)![An Axiom selection visible in the Minimap.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14ca0478ba1185f6e02f30a2e49b171a9b78615d_0.webp)![A WorldEdit selection visible in the Minimap.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ff04713246ac3f09556b387026808bd78de0fa1.png)![A WorldEdit selection visible in the World Map.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fff966aeeef7b5312121f2067f4606129895a83.png)
